utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Each of these items is fully specified: the property section includes details, price, and location; the financing section includes solution type and full mortgage terms; the legal_services section includes service name and costs; the moving_services section includes service name and costs; the setup_services section includes utilities, fees, and inspection; and the total_budget section includes purchase price, itemized initial costs, and recurring monthly costs. Therefore, all 6 of 6 items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shows a 2-bedroom 95 sqm modern, smart, energy-efficient condo in Downtown Toronto priced at CAD $480,000. From the ground-truth ratings, the only purchase property that matches a 95 sqm, eco-friendly, smart home, energy-efficient, modern development at $480K is 'New Build' with a rating of 10. The financing solution is a standard mortgage with 5% down payment—this aligns most closely with 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage type in the ground truth, which has a rating of 10. The legal service chosen is 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service chosen is 'Standard Moving Service' (which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' with rating 9). The property inspection/service cost given as CAD $400 matches 'New Build Inspection' (rating 7). Utilities include a basic monthly setup of CAD $120 (matches 'Basic Utilities', rating 6) and an optional premium package of CAD $280 (matches 'Premium Utilities', rating 9).
